title: Add Exovia Destek to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Exovia Destek joins the hive
gist.blurb: A new Discord bot powered by Pollinations just landed in the greenhouse! Say hello to Exovia Destek, the latest community creation.
gist.summary: Added the Exovia Destek Discord bot to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: The community directory now features Exovia Destek, highlighting another creative way developers are using Pollinations in Discord.
gist.visual_concept: A new Discord bot being added to the 'greenhouse'. Depict the Pollinations bee welcoming a cute robot (representing the bot) into a literal greenhouse filled with plants and glowing screens.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot welcoming a chunky little robot friend into a lush digital greenhouse filled with glowing code-plants. The robot has a soft pastel blue screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot welcoming a chunky little robot friend into a lush digital greenhouse filled with glowing code-plants. The robot has a soft pastel blue screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
